description_long: This induction cooker features a rectangular black body with a glossy finish and a front-facing oven door. The cooktop is equipped with four circular brass-colored burners, each surrounded by black grates, and a set of four metallic control knobs aligned on the right side. The oven section has a transparent window and three additional control knobs, suggesting separate controls for the oven and cooktop. Two small, cylindrical containers, likely salt and pepper shakers, are positioned nearby, indicating a kitchen context. The overall design is compact and modern, with metallic accents providing a touch of sophistication.
description: A compact black induction cooker with four brass burners, metallic control knobs, and an integrated oven with a glass door.
description_view_0: The left side and top of the cooker are visible, showing the four burners and the side panel with no controls.
description_view_1: The rear and top of the cooker are visible, with the burners and control knobs on the right; two small containers are seen beside it.
description_view_2: The front of the cooker is visible, displaying the oven door, three oven control knobs, and the cooktop with four burners and four control knobs.
description_view_3: The right side and top of the cooker are visible, with the control knobs and oven handle prominent; two small containers are nearby.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel consists of four metallic knobs aligned vertically on the right side of the cooktop and three additional knobs on the right side of the oven door. No digital displays or indicator lights are visible; the knobs are likely labeled with icons or numbers.
